tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
grep -E '^(#?PasswordAuthentication|#?KbdInteractiveAutheentication|#?ChallengeResponseAuthentication|#?PubkeyAuthentication|#?PermitRootLLogin)' /etc/ssh/sshd_config /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/*.conf 2>/dev/null || true
/etc/ssh/sshd_config:PermitRootLogin no
/etc/ssh/sshd_config:#PubkeyAuthentication yes
/etc/ssh/sshd_config:PasswordAuthentication yes
/etc/ssh/sshd_config:KbdInteractiveAuthentication no
0;root@UbuntuSSHVictim: /root@UbuntuSSHVictim:/#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuSSHVictim","command":"cp /etc/ssh/sshd_config /etc/ssh/sshd_config.bak && printf '%s\n' 'PasswordAuthentication no' 'KbdInteractiveAuthentication no' 'ChallengeResponseAuthentication no' 'PubkeyAuthentication yes' > /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/99-mitigation.conf && sshd -t && echo CONFIG_OK"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
cp /etc/ssh/sshd_config /etc/ssh/sshd_config.bak && printtf '%s
> ' 'PasswordAuthentication no' 'KbdInteractiveAuthentication no' 'ChallengeRespoonseAuthentication no' 'PubkeyAuthentication yes' > /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/99-mittigation.conf && sshd -t && echo CONFIG_OK
CONFIG_OK
0;root@UbuntuSSHVictim: /root@UbuntuSSHVictim:/#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuSSHVictim","command":"cat /etc/ssh/sshd_config /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/99-mitigation.conf | sshd -t && echo VERIFIED && (systemctl reload ssh 2>/dev/null || service ssh reload 2>/dev/null || pkill -HUP sshd 2>/dev/null || true)"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
cat /etc/ssh/sshd_config /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/99-mitigaation.conf | sshd -t && echo VERIFIED && (systemctl reload ssh 2>/dev/null || serrvice ssh reload 2>/dev/null || pkill -HUP sshd 2>/dev/null || true)
VERIFIED
 * Reloading OpenBSD Secure Shell server's configuration sshd        [ OK ]
0;root@UbuntuSSHVictim: /root@UbuntuSSHVictim:/#
